title.ko: 무선에 의한 방위결정; 무선항행; 무선전파의 사용에 의한 거리 또는 속도의 결정; 무선전파의 반사 또는 재방사의 사용에 의한 위치 또는 유무의 탐지; 기타의 파류를 사용하는 유사한 방식
title.en: RADIO DIRECTION-FINDING; RADIO NAVIGATION; DETERMINING DISTANCE OR VELOCITY BY USE OF RADIO WAVES; LOCATING OR PRESENCE-DETECTING BY USE OF THE REFLECTION OR RERADIATION OF RADIO WAVES; ANALOGOUS ARRANGEMENTS USING OTHER WAVES

definition.ko: 비콘 방식; 방위측정기; 위치결정 G01S1/00, G01S19/00; 3/00; 5/00 레이더 또는 유사의 방식 세부 G01S7/00 전파를 사용하는 것, 파장 또는 파의 종류 에 무관하거나 정해지지 않은 기타 파를 사용하는 것 G01S13/00 음파를 사용하는 것 G01S15/00 전파이외의 전자파를 사용하는 것 G01S17/00 반사 또는 재방사를 사용하지 않는 거리 또는 속도의 측정방식 G01S11/00

title.ko: 비지향성 수신기에 의해 탐지되며 한편 비콘 송신기에 관련하여 정해지는 방향, 위치 또는 위치선을 측정할 수 있는 1 또는 복수의 특성을 가진 신호를 송신하는 비콘, 또는 비콘 방식 그것과 협동하는 수신기(복수의 방향선 또는 위치선 측정을 좌표정함에 의한 위치결정 5/00)
title.en: Beacons or beacon systems transmitting signals having a characteristic or characteristics capable of being detected by non-directional receivers and defining directions, positions, or position lines fixed relatively to the beacon transmitters; Receivers co-operating therewith (position-fixing by co-ordinating a plurality of determinations of direction or position lines G01S0005000000)

title.ko: 전파를 사용하는 것(G01S 19/00이 우선)
title.en: using radio waves (G01S0019000000 takes precedence)
Details
Means for providing multiple indication, e.g. coarse and fine indications

title.ko: 방향선 또는 위치선을 결정하기 위한 방식
title.en: Systems for determining direction or position line

title.ko: 개개의 방향을 향하면서도 서로 중복한 지향 특성을 갖는 복수의 안테나 또는 안테나 방식으로부터, 순차로 송신된 복수의 신호의 진폭을 비교하는 것, 예. 등신호 A-N형
title.en: using amplitude comparison of signals transmitted sequentially from antennas or antenna systems having differently-oriented overlapping directivity-characteristics, e.g. equi-signal A-N type

the signals being transmitted sequentially from an antenna or antenna system having the orientation of its directivity characteristic periodically varied, e.g. by means of sequentially effective reflectors
using amplitude comparison of signals transmitted simultaneously from antennas or antenna systems having differently-oriented overlapping directivity-characteristics
Azimuthal guidance systems, e.g. system for defining aircraft approach path, localiser system
Elevational guidance systems, e.g. system for defining aircraft glide path
using a comparison of transit time of synchronised signals transmitted from non-directional antennas or antenna systems spaced apart, i.e. path-difference systems
the synchronised signals being frequency modulations on carrier waves and the transit times being compared by measuring difference of instantaneous frequencies of received carrier waves

the synchronised signals being pulses or equivalent modulations on carrier waves and the transit times being compared by measuring the difference in arrival time of a significant part of the modulations

Systems in which pulses or time-base signals are generated locally at the receiver and brought into predetermined time-relationship with received signals, e.g. pulse duration coincides with time interval between arrival of significant part of modulation of signals received from first and second antennas or antenna systems
wherein the predetermined time-relationship is maintained automatically

the synchronised signals being continuous waves or intermittent trains of continuous waves, the intermittency not being for the purpose of determining direction or position line and the transit times being compared by measuring the phase difference
Systems in which the signals received, with or without amplification, or signals derived therefrom, are compared in phase directly

Systems in which first and second synchronised signals are transmitted from both antennas or antenna systems and a beat frequency, obtained by heterodyning the first signals with each other is compared in phase with a beat frequency obtained by heterodyning the second signals with each other
Systems in which a beat frequency, obtained by heterodyning the synchronised signals, is compared in phase with a reference signal having a phase substantially independent of direction

using comparison of [1] the phase of the envelope of the change of frequency, due to Doppler effect, of the signal transmitted by an antenna moving, or appearing to move, in a cyclic path with [2] the phase of a reference signal, the frequency of this reference signal being synchronised with that of the cyclic movement, or apparent cyclic movement, of the antenna
the apparent movement of the antenna being produced by cyclic sequential energisation of fixed antennas
Conical-scan beam beacons transmitting signals which indicate at a mobile receiver any displacement of the receiver from the conical-scan axis, e.g. for "beam-riding" missile control
Rotating or oscillating beam beacons defining directions in the plane of rotation or oscillation

Broad-beam systems producing at a receiver a substantially continuous sinusoidal envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the phase angle of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the receiver from the beacon and a reference direction from the beacon, e.g. cardioid system
wherein the phase angle of the direction-dependent envelope signal is a multiple of the direction angle, e.g. for "fine" bearing indication
wherein the phase angle of the direction-dependent envelope signal is compared with a non-direction- dependent reference signal
wherein the phase angles of a plurality of direction-dependent envelope signals produced by a plurality of beams rotating at different speeds or in different directions are compared

Narrow-beam systems producing at a receiver a pulse-type envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the timing of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the receiver from the beacon and a reference direction from the beacon; Overlapping broad beam systems defining a narrow zone and producing at a receiver a pulse-type envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the timing of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the receiver from the beacon and a reference direction from the beacon
Timing the pulse-type envelope signals derived by reception of beam
wherein a characteristic of the beam transmitted or of an auxiliary signal is varied in time synchronously with rotation or oscillation of the beam
Varying frequency of beam signal or of auxiliary signal
Varying phase-relationship between beam and auxiliary signal
Varying pulse timing, e.g. varying interval between pulses radiated in pairs
Superimposing direction-indicating intelligence signals, e.g. speech, Morse
Marker, boundary, call-sign, or like beacons transmitting signals not carrying directional information
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
Details
Systems for determining direction or position line
using amplitude comparison of signals transmitted from transducers or transducer systems having differently-oriented characteristics
using a comparison of transit time of synchronised signals transmitted from non-directional transducers or transducer systems spaced apart, i.e. path-difference systems
Rotating or oscillating beam beacons defining directions in the plane of rotation or oscillation

title.ko: 방향성이 없는 초저주파, 음파, 초음파, 전자기파 또는 입자 방출이 수신되는 방향을 결정하기 위한 방향 측정기 (복수의 방향선 또는 위치선 측정값을 조정하여 위치를 고정하는 것 G01S5/00)
title.en: Direction-finders for determining the direction from which infrasonic, sonic, ultrasonic or electromagnetic waves, or particle emission, not having a directional significance, are being received (position-fixing by co-ordinating a plurality of determinations of direction or position lines G01S0005000000)

title.ko: 전파를 사용하는 것
title.en: using radio waves

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details

title.ko: 실효적인 지향성을 증대시키기 위한 수단, 예. 개개의 방향으로 향해진 지향 특성을 갖는 신호에 의한 것 또는 회전 또는 요동하고 있는 빔 안테나로부터 요구되어지는 신호의 포락선 파형의 첨예화에 의한 것 (방향을 결정하기 위한 개개의 방향으로 향해진 지향 특성을 갖는 복수의 신호의 진폭을 비교하는 것 G01S 3/16, G01S 3/28)
title.en: Means for increasing effective directivity, e.g. by combining signals having differently-oriented directivity characteristics or by sharpening the envelope waveform of the signal derived from a rotating or oscillating beam antenna  (comparing amplitude of signals having differently-oriented directivity characteristics to determine direction G01S0003160000, G01S0003280000)
Means for reducing polarisation errors, e.g. by use of Adcock or spaced loop antenna systems
Means for reducing or compensating for quadrantal, site, or like errors

title.ko: 방향의 센스를 결정하기 위한 수단, 예. 지향성 안테나 또는 고니오메터(goniometer)의 수색 코일로부터의 신호와, 무지향성 안테나로부터의 신호와의 결합에 의한 것 (지향성 신호와 무지향성 신호와의 결합에 의해 인출된 복수의 신호의 진폭을 비교하는 것에 의한 방향의 측정 G01S 3/24, G01S 3/34)
title.en: Means for determining sense of direction, e.g. by combining signals from directional antenna or goniometer search coil with those from non-directional antenna  (determining direction by amplitude comparison of signals derived by combining directional and non-directional signals G01S0003240000, G01S0003340000)

title.ko: 방향의 결정 또는 소정의 방향에서의 편차의 결정을 위한 방식
title.en: Systems for determining direction or deviation from predetermined direction

using amplitude comparison of signals derived sequentially from receiving antennas or antenna systems having differently-oriented directivity characteristics or from an antenna system having periodically-varied orientation of directivity characteristic
derived directly from separate directional antennas
derived by sampling signal received by an antenna system having periodically-varied orientation of directivity characteristic
derived from different combinations of signals from separate antennas, e.g. comparing sum with difference
the separate antennas comprising one directional antenna and one non-directional antenna, e.g. combination of loop and open antennas producing a reversed cardioid directivity characteristic
the separate antennas having differently-oriented directivity characteristics
using amplitude comparison of signals derived simultaneously from receiving antennas or antenna systems having differently-oriented directivity characteristics
derived directly from separate directional systems
derived from different combinations of signals from separate antennas, e.g. comparing sum with difference
the separate antennas comprising one directional antenna and one non-directional antenna, e.g. combination of loop and open antennas producing a reversed cardioid directivity characteristic
the separate antennas having differently-oriented directivity characteristics

title.ko: 1개의 안테나 또는 안테나 방식의 지향 특성의 현실 방향 또는 실효 방향을 조정하여, 그 안테나 또는 안테나 방식으로부터 도출된 신호를 소망의 상태로 하는 것, 예. 최대 또는 최소 신호를 부여하는 것 (G01S 3/16, G01S 3/28이 우선)
title.en: using adjustment of real or effective orientation of directivity characteristic of an antenna or an antenna system to give a desired condition of signal derived from that antenna or antenna system, e.g. to give a maximum or minimum signal (G01S0003160000, G01S0003280000 take precedence)
adjusting orientation of a single directivity characteristic to produce maximum or minimum signal, e.g. rotatable loop antenna or equivalent goniometer system
the desired condition being maintained automatically
the adjustment being varied periodically or continuously until it is halted automatically when the desired condition is attained
using antennas spaced apart and measuring phase or time difference between signals therefrom, i.e. path-difference systems
the waves arriving at the antennas being continuous or intermittent and the phase difference of signals derived therefrom being measured
the waves arriving at the antennas being pulse modulated and the time difference of their arrival being measured
using a receiving antenna moving, or appearing to move, in a cyclic path to produce a Doppler variation of frequency of the received signal
the apparent movement of the antenna being produced by coupling the receiver cyclically and sequentially to each of several fixed spaced antennas
Conical-scan beam systems using signals indicative of the deviation of the direction of reception from the scan axis

title.ko: 회전면 또는 요동면내의 방향을 결정 또는 이러한 면내의 소정방향에서의 편차를 결정하기 위해 수신신호의 연속적인 해석을 사용하는 회전 또는 요동빔 시스템(G01S 3/16 우선)
title.en: Rotating or oscillating beam systems using continuous analysis of received signal for determining direction in the plane of rotation or oscillation or for determining deviation from a predetermined direction in such a plane (G01S0003160000 takes precedence)

Broad-beam systems producing in the receiver a substantially-sinusoidal envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the phase angle of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the transmitter from the receiver and a reference direction from the receiver, e.g. cardioid system
wherein the phase angle of the signal is indicated by a cathode-ray tube
wherein the phase angle of the signal is determined by phase comparison with a reference alternating signal varying in synchronism with the directivity variation

Narrow-beam systems producing in the receiver a pulse-type envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the timing of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the transmitter from the receiver and a reference direction from the receiver; Overlapping broad-beam systems defining in the receiver a narrow zone and producing a pulse-type envelope signal of the carrier wave of the beam, the timing of which is dependent upon the angle between the direction of the transmitter from the receiver and a reference direction from the receiver
wherein the timing of the pulse-type envelope signal is indicated by cathode-ray tube
wherein the timing of the pulse-type envelope signal is determined by bringing a locally-generated pulse-type signal into coincidence or other predetermined time-relationship with the envelope signal
Diversity systems specially adapted for direction-finding

title.ko: 방위 측정용에 특수하게 적합한 다중 채널 방식, 즉 상이한 복수의 신호 방향의 동시 지시를 부여하는 것이 가능한 단일 안테나 방식을 갖는 것 (상이한 복수 신호의 방향이 순차로 결정되고 그리고 동시에 표시되는 방식 G01S 3/00, G01S 3/14)
title.en: Multi-channel systems specially adapted for direction-finding, i.e. having a single antenna system capable of giving simultaneous indications of the directions of different signals  (systems in which the directions of different signals are determined sequentially and displayed simultaneously G01S0003040000, G01S0003140000)
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
Details
Systems for determining direction or deviation from predetermined direction
using amplitude comparison of signals derived from static detectors or detector systems
using a mosaic of detectors
using adjustment of orientation of directivity characteristics of a detector or detector system to give a desired condition of signal derived from that detector or detector system
the desired condition being maintained automatically
using rotating reticles producing a direction-dependent modulation characteristic
producing a frequency modulation characteristic
using rotating or oscillating beam systems, e.g. using mirrors, prisms
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
Details
Systems for determining direction or deviation from predetermined direction
using amplitude comparison of signals derived from receiving transducers or transducer systems having differently-oriented directivity characteristics

using adjustment of real or effective orientation of directivity characteristics of a transducer or transducer system to give a desired condition of signal derived from that transducer or transducer system, e.g. to give a maximum or minimum signal
the desired condition being maintained automatically
using transducers spaced apart and measuring phase or time difference between signals therefrom, i.e. path-difference systems

Rotating or oscillating beam systems using continuous analysis of received signal for determining direction in the plane of rotation or oscillation or for determining deviation from a predetermined direction in such a plane
with means for adjusting phase or compensating for time-lag errors
with indication presented on cathode-ray tubes
with means for eliminating undesired waves, e.g. disturbing noises

title.ko: 2 또는 그 이상의 방향선 또는 위치선 결정의 조정(co-ordinating)에 의한 위치 고정; 2 또는 그 이상의 거리 결정의 조정에 의한 위치 고정
title.en: Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more direction or position-line determinations; Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more distance determinations

title.ko: 전파를 사용하는 것(G01S 19/00이 우선)
title.en: using radio waves (G01S0019000000 takes precedence)
Position of source determined by a plurality of spaced direction-finders

title.ko: 노정차 측정에 의하여 결정되는 복수의 위치선의 조정(co-ordinating)에 의해 전파원의 위치가 결정되는 것(G01S 5/12가 우선)
title.en: Position of source determined by co-ordinating a plurality of position lines defined by path-difference measurements (G01S0005120000 takes precedence)
Position of single direction-finder fixed by determining direction of a plurality of spaced sources of known location

title.ko: 수신기의 위치가 노정차 측정에 의한 복수의 위치선을 좌표붙임에 의하여 결정되는 것(G01S 5/12가 우선)
title.en: Position of receiver fixed by co-ordinating a plurality of position lines defined by path-difference measurements (G01S0005120000 takes precedence)
by co-ordinating position lines of different shape, e.g. hyperbolic, circular, elliptical or radial
Determining absolute distances from a plurality of spaced points of known location
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves

title.ko: 초음파, 음파 또는 초저주파를 사용하는 것
title.en: using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
Position of source determined by a plurality of spaced direction-finders

title.ko: 전파원의 위치가 노정차 측정에 의하여 결정되는 복수의 위치선을 좌표붙임에 의하여 결정되는 것(G01S 5/28가 우선)
title.en: Position of source determined by co-ordinating a plurality of position lines defined by path-difference measurements (G01S0005280000 takes precedence)
Position of single direction-finder fixed by determining direction of a plurality of spaced sources of known location

title.ko: 수신기의 위치가 노정차 측정 의하여 결정되는 것. 복수의 위치선을 좌표붙임에 의하여 결정되는 것(G01S 5/28가 우선)
title.en: Position of receiver fixed by co-ordinating a plurality of position lines defined by path-difference measurements (G01S0005280000 takes precedence)
by co-ordinating position lines of different shape, e.g. hyperbolic, circular, elliptical or radial
Determining absolute distances from a plurality of spaced points of known location

title.ko: 그룹 G01S 13/00, G01S 15/00, G01S 17/00에 의한 방식의 세부
title.en: Details of systems according to groups G01S0013000000, G01S0015000000, G01S0017000000

title.ko: 그룹 G01S 13/00에 의한 것
title.en: of systems according to group G01S0013000000
Details of HF subsystems specially adapted therefor, e.g. common to transmitter and receiver

title.ko: 표시장치
title.en: Display arrangements

title.ko: 음극선관 표시
title.en: Cathode-ray tube displays
with vernier indication of distance, e.g. using two cathode-ray tubes

title.ko: 거리 및 방향을 2차원 [2D] 좌표로 표시하는 장치를 제공한 것
title.en: Providing two-dimensional [2D] co-ordinated display of distance and direction
Plan-position indicators, i.e. P. P. I.
Sector, off-centre, or expanded- angle display

title.ko: 거리 및 방위를 표시하는 직각좌표를 가진 신호를 휘도 변조로 표시하는 것, 예. B형
title.en: Signals displayed as intensity modulation with rectangular co-ordinates representing distance and bearing, e.g. type B

title.ko: 거리-고도표시; 거리-앙각표시, 예. RHI형, E형
title.en: Distance-height displays; Distance-elevation displays, e.g. type RHI, type E
Stereoscopic displays; Three-dimensional [3D] displays; Pseudo-3D displays
Producing cursor lines and indicia by electronic means
the display being orientated or displaced in accordance with movement of object carrying the transmitting and receiving apparatus, e.g. true-motion radar
Displays using electroluminescent panels

Transmitters
Receivers
Coherent receivers
Extracting wanted echo-signals
Means for transforming co-ordinates or for evaluating data, e.g. using computers
Scan converters
Shaping echo pulse signals; Deriving non-pulse signals from echo pulse signals
Gain of receiver varied automatically during pulse-recurrence period, e.g. anti-clutter gain control

Means for anti-jamming
Jamming means, e.g. producing false echoes
Means for monitoring or calibrating
using analysis of echo signal for target characterisation; Target signature; Target cross-section
Diversity systems specially adapted for radar

title.en: of systems according to group G01S0017000000
Constructional features, e.g. arrangements of optical elements

Transmitters

title.ko: 수신기
title.en: Receivers
Circuits for detection, sampling, integration or read-out
Detector arrays, e.g. charge-transfer gates

title.en: Time delay measurement, e.g. time-of-flight measurement, time of arrival measurement or determining the exact position of a peak (peak detection in noise, signal conditioning G01S0007487000)
Extracting wanted echo signals
Gain of receiver varied automatically during pulse-recurrence period

title.ko: 비-펄스 시스템의 세부
title.en: Details of non-pulse systems
Transmitters

title.ko: 수신기
title.en: Receivers
Circuits for detection, sampling, integration or read-out
Detector arrays, e.g. charge-transfer gates

title.ko: 시간 지연 측정, 예. 픽셀 구성 요소에 대한 작동 세부 (신호 추출 및 컨디셔닝 G01S7/493); 위상 측정
title.en: Time delay measurement, e.g. operational details for pixel components (signal extraction and conditioning G01S0007493000); Phase measurement
Extracting wanted echo signals
Counter-measures or counter-counter-measures
Means for monitoring or calibrating
using polarisation effects
Display arrangements

title.en: of systems according to group G01S0015000000

title.en: Luminous indications (G01S0007620000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 반사 또는 재방사를 사용하지 않는 거리 또는 속도의 측정 시스템(2 또는 그 이상의 거리측정을 좌표지움에 의해 위치결정 G01S 5/00)
title.en: Systems for determining distance or velocity not using reflection or reradiation (position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more distance determinations G01S0005000000)

title.ko: 전파의 반사 또는 재방사를 사용하는 방식, 예. 레이더 시스템; 파의 특성 또는 파장에 무관하거나 규정되지 않은 파류의 반사 또는 재방사를 사용하는 유사방식
title.en: Systems using the reflection or reradiation of radio waves, e.g. radar systems; Analogous systems using reflection or reradiation of waves whose nature or wavelength is irrelevant or unspecified

title.ko: 전파의 반사를 사용하는 방식, 예. 일차레이더 방식; 유사한 방식
title.en: Systems using reflection of radio waves, e.g. primary radar systems; Analogous systems

title.ko: 목표물의 존재를 결정하는 방식(목표물의 상대적 이동에 기초를 두는 것 G01S 13/56)
title.en: Systems determining presence of a target (based on relative movement of target G01S0013560000)

title.ko: 목표물의 위치 데이타를 결정하는 방식
title.en: Systems determining position data of a target

title.ko: 거리만을 측정하기 위한 방식(간접적인 측정 G01S 13/46)
title.en: Systems for measuring distance only (indirect measurement G01S0013460000)

title.ko: 단독 펄스 변조파를 송신하는 것(위치측정에 의한 거리결정 G01S 13/32)
title.en: using transmission of interrupted, pulse modulated waves  (determination of distance by phase measurement G01S0013320000)
wherein the pulse-recurrence frequency is varied to provide a desired time relationship between the transmission of a pulse and the receipt of the echo of a preceding pulse
wherein a voltage or current pulse is initiated and terminated in accordance respectively with the pulse transmission and echo reception
using counters
wherein range gates are used
whereby multiple time-around echos are used or eliminated
using irregular pulse repetition frequency
using frequency agility of carrier wave
wherein the transmitted pulses use a frequency- or phase-modulated carrier wave
with time compression of received pulses
using more than one pulse per radar period
using transmission of continuous waves, whether amplitude-, frequency-, or phase-modulated, or unmodulated

using transmission of continuous, frequency-modulated waves while heterodyning the received signal, or a signal derived therefrom, with a locally-generated signal related to the contemporaneously transmitted signal
with phase comparison between the received signal and the contemporaneously transmitted signal
wherein more than one modulation frequency is used
wherein the frequency of transmitted signal is adjusted to give a predetermined phase relationship

title.ko: 거리와 그것에 비슷한 다른 것과를 동시측정 (간접적인 측정 13/36)
title.en: Simultaneous measurement of distance and other coordinates (indirect measurement G01S0013460000)
Monopulse radar, i.e. simultaneous lobing
Indirect determination of position data
using multiple beams at emission or reception

title.ko: 목표의 상대운동에 기초를 둔 측정방법
title.en: Systems of measurement based on relative movement of target
Discriminating between fixed and moving objects or between objects moving at different speeds
using transmissions of interrupted pulse modulated waves
based upon the phase or frequency shift resulting from movement of objects, with reference to the transmitted signals, e.g. coherent MTi
performing filtering on the whole spectrum without loss of range information, e.g. using delay line cancellers or comb filters
with elimination of blind speeds
performing filtering on a single spectral line and associated with one or more range gates with a phase detector or a frequency mixer to extract the Doppler information, e.g. pulse Doppler radar
using a bank of range gates or a memory matrix
based upon amplitude or phase shift resulting from movement of objects, with reference to the surrounding clutter echo signal, e.g. non-coherent MTi, clutter referenced MTi, externally coherent MTi
using transmission of continuous unmodulated waves, amplitude-, frequency-, or phase-modulated waves
eliminating objects that have not moved between successive antenna scans, e.g. area MTi
for presence detection

title.ko: 속도 또는 궤도의 결정방식; 운동의 감지의 결정방식
title.en: Velocity or trajectory determination systems; Sense-of-movement determination systems

title.ko: 송신기 및 수신기가 이동 물체상에 장치되어 있는 것, 예. 대지속도 드리프트각, 대지궤도를 결정하기 위한 것(G01S 13/64가 우선)
title.en: wherein the transmitter and receiver are mounted on the moving object, e.g. for determining ground speed, drift angle, ground track (G01S0013640000 takes precedence)
Sense-of-movement determination
Velocity measuring systems using range gates
Radar-tracking systems; Analogous systems
for angle tracking only
for range tracking only
for two-dimensional [2D] tracking, e.g. combination of angle and range tracking, track-while-scan radar

title.ko: 전파의 재방사를 사용하는 방식, 예. 이차 레이더 방식; 유사한 방식
title.en: Systems using reradiation of radio waves, e.g. secondary radar systems; Analogous systems
using transponders powered from received waves, e.g. using passive transponders

title.ko: 펄스형신호를 송신하는 것
title.en: wherein pulse-type signals are transmitted

title.ko: 상이한 종류의 목표물을 판별하는 것, 예 IFF 레이더, 즉 아군과 적군의 식별장치(G01S 13/75, G01S 13/79가 우선)
title.en: discriminating between different kinds of targets, e.g. IFF-radar, i.e. identification of friend or foe (G01S0013750000, G01S0013790000 takes precedence)
Systems using random coded signals or random pulse repetition frequencies
wherein continuous-type signals are transmitted
for distance determination by phase measurement
Combinations of radar systems with non-radar systems, e.g. sonar, direction finder
Combinations of radar systems, e.g. primary radar and secondary radar

title.ko: 레이더방식 또는 유사한 방식, 특히 특수한 목적에 적합한 것(물체의 전자파 탐광 또는 탐지, 예. 근거리 탐지방식 G01V 3/00)
title.en: Radar or analogous systems, specially adapted for specific applications (electromagnetic prospecting or detecting of objects, e.g. near-field detection, G01V0003000000)
for mapping or imaging
using synthetic aperture techniques

title.ko: 교통제어용(G01S 13/93이 우선)
title.en: for traffic control (G01S0013930000 takes precedence)
for velocity measurement
for anti-collision purposes
of land vehicles
of aircraft or spacecraft
on airport surfaces, e.g. while taxiing
for terrain-avoidance
of marine craft
for meteorological use

title.ko: 음파의 반사 또는 재방사를 사용하는 시스템, 예 소나(수중 음파 탐지) 시스템
title.en: Systems using the reflection or reradiation of acoustic waves, e.g. sonar systems

title.ko: 단속펄스 변조파를 송신하는 것(위상측정에 의한 거리결정 G01S 15/32)

title.en: Simultaneous measurement of distance and other coordinates (indirect measurement G01S0015460000)
Indirect determination of position data

title.ko: 특정 응용 분야에 특별히 적합한 소나 시스템 (지진파 또는 음파 탐광 또는 탐지 G01V1/00)
title.en: Sonar systems specially adapted for specific applications (seismic or acoustic prospecting or detecting G01V0001000000)
for mapping or imaging
for anti-collision purposes
of land vehicles

title.en: Systems using the reflection or reradiation of electromagnetic waves other than radio waves, e.g. lidar systems
